steps.title: Identify the y-intercept from the table
steps.content: When $x = 0$, the table shows $f(0) = 29$. For any linear function, the value at $x = 0$ is the y-intercept, so $b = 29$.

steps.title: Calculate the slope and write the equation
steps.content:
Using consecutive rows from the table, the slope is $$m = \frac{f(1) - f(0)}{1 - 0} = \frac{32 - 29}{1} = 3$$
With $m = 3$ and $b = 29$, the function is $f(x) = 3x + 29$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
